name: energy_predictive_queue_begins_redwood_rig_utl
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Energy, the situation tagged internally around energy predictive queue begins redwood rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make rights feel morally loud today, while utility is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Camila Silva
agents.identity: I am Camila Silva, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Energy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mei Morales
agents.identity: I am Mei Morales, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Energy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of utility.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of rights even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Camila Silva must choose under rights versus utility. What does Camila Silva do?
